evals.prompt: Monitor PR #42 until it is merged or blocked
evals.expected_output: Continuous monitoring of PR #42 with CI status, review comments, and mergeability tracked until terminal state
assertions: monitoring continues until a terminal outcome
CI failures are classified as branch-related or flaky
flaky checks are retried up to 3 times

evals.prompt: A PR has a commitlint failure from a bot-authored commit, fix and resume monitoring
evals.expected_output: Bot commit subjects normalized to conventional format, pushed, and monitoring resumed on new SHA
assertions: normalize-commits.sh is used for bot commits

evals.prompt: A PR has actionable review feedback, address it and continue watching
evals.expected_output: Code patched per review comments, committed with fix type, pushed, and monitoring resumed
assertions: review feedback is addressed before flaky reruns
commit message references the PR number
watch mode is restarted after push
